cases.prompt: 코드 없이 온라인 클래스 수익화하고 싶어. 노코드 결제로.

assertions.text: Matches operating platforms (클래스101·탈잉·크몽·Stripe Payment Links·Gumroad 등).
Does NOT write code — operates via no-code platforms.

cases.prompt: I'm a creator who wants a subscription model without any backend or repo.

assertions.text: Covers pricing / free trial / bundle without code.
